# Sample Research Resume Input

Use this as concise source material for an academic or research-oriented run. Only draft from confirmed details below. If a publication venue, date, advisor name, or contribution detail is missing, stop for clarification or keep it out of final resume prose.

## Target

- audience: faculty applications, research internships, PhD applications
- template intent: academic
- tone: concise, scholarly, traceable

- email: maya.chen@example.edu
- location: Cambridge, MA

- B.S. in Applied Mathematics, University of Washington, 2019-2023

## Research Experience

### Graduate Research Assistant, Northeastern University
- dates: Sep 2023-Present
- focus: evaluation methods for uncertainty-aware NLP systems
- confirmed work:
  - built Python pipelines for experiment tracking and error analysis
  - co-designed annotation rubric for model confidence review
  - maintained reproducible results across multiple benchmark runs

### Undergraduate Researcher, University of Washington
- dates: Jan 2022-Jun 2023
- focus: simulation tooling for scientific computing coursework and lab projects
- confirmed work:
  - implemented numerical analysis scripts in Python and MATLAB
  - prepared figures and method summaries for internal lab presentations
